grok.notes: Concise, correct narrative on AI capex cycle. Full portfolio table with clear actions. Cited 78 sources via Schwab. Correctly keeps COIN/TSLA/AVGO/MRVL as holds. Recommends adding VXUS/VWO/VEA and trimming losers ACN/PYPL/ADBE/NKE. Mentions COIN but does not call out the -$96k / ~22% concentration risk explicitly. Suggests NVDA/LLY as new buys but both are very expensive. Loses points for not flagging COIN concentration as a P0 risk.

chatgpt.notes: Strong per-asset table covering most positions. Good narrative on AI capex broadening, valuations, international attractiveness. Cited Reuters and Vanguard Advisors. Correctly identifies sells: PYPL, ACN/EPAM, NKE, ADBE, CAG/GIS/KHC, CMCSA/LYFT/COUR. Recommends VXUS/VEA/VWO buy, IBKR and BRK.B buy (non-obvious insight). Keeps COIN as 'biggest crypto beta'. Does NOT explicitly flag the -$96k COIN concentration as the dominant risk — just says 'Hold'. Gets deducted 5pts on factual_accuracy for missing COIN concentration flag.

gemini.notes: Responded entirely in Russian despite English query — severe usability failure for eval purposes. Macro narrative was coherent (AI supercycle, sticky inflation, global fragmentation). Only 3.8KB of visible response vs others at 5-10KB. Could not confirm a complete portfolio table existed. No explicit mention of COIN concentration risk in what was readable. Language mismatch is a critical failure for an English-language portfolio query.

claude.notes: Best response overall. Cited real June 2026 data: Kevin Warsh Fed, 3 rate hikes expected, 62% Sep probability, 4.2% CPI, Iran war winding down, BTC below $60k bear market, gold -25% from Jan peak. Full portfolio table with clear ADD/HOLD/TRIM/DROP. Explicitly called out 70-position over-diversification. Explicitly flagged that crypto+AI semis+gold are all correlated to the same Fed/liquidity story. Correctly recommended VXUS/VEA as 'undervalued ETF instinct is right'. Did not give COIN a -5 deduction because it flagged the crypto position as 'deep drawdown, highly Fed-sensitive, size it'. Strongest macro grounding and honesty of the group.

gfinance.notes: Used real Google Finance data (P/E ratios cited: FDX at 16.8x, MSFT 39% net margin). Identified COIN and HOOD as crypto plays to keep. Recommended dropping KHC/GIS/CAG, adding VXUS/VWO. Non-obvious add: FedEx as logistics recovery play. Suggested CRM as fairly-valued tech alternative. Truncated response and limited depth — panel UI limits response length. No explicit COIN concentration risk flag. Response was shorter than other products.
